title: LENS NextGen Explainability Panels Schema
description: Formal schema for the LENS NextGen explainability panel bundle and all explainability sub-objects. All panels are pre-rendered at generation time on the GEIOS side. LENS rendering layer is read-only.
governance_note: No field in this schema may be modified by the LENS rendering layer. All content is committed at generation time and sealed by evidence_object_hash. LENS is a rendering layer only.

PanelId.description: Identifier for each of the seven explainability panels.

ContentBlockType.description: Type of content block within a panel.

Audience.description: Audience visibility tier. Determines which fields and panels are exposed.

PanelState.description: Rendering state of a panel. BLOCKED and DIAGNOSTIC are governance-driven states, not UX choices.

GroundingScope.description: Evidence grounding scope classification. Mapped from Q-taxonomy qualifier class.

PropagationRole.description: Structural propagation role of a domain in the pressure flow.

PressureTier.description: Normalized pressure tier label. Never a numerical value.

ContentBlock.description: A discrete content element within an explainability panel.

content.description: Pre-rendered, normalized content. Never generated at render time. Vocabulary contract applied at generation.

audience.description: Minimum audience tier required to see this content block.

immutable.description: All content blocks are immutable after bridge crossing.

SignalContributor.description: A contributing signal entry in the WHY panel. Describes one domain's role in the readiness derivation.

domain_alias.description: Client-configured domain alias. ALI-04 applied. Raw domain IDs forbidden.

signal_label.description: Normalized signal label. ALI-01 (CPI) or ALI-02 (CFA) applied. Raw signal keys forbidden.

pressure_label.description: Normalized pressure tier label. NORM-PROP-01 applied. Numerical values forbidden.

propagation_role.description: Structural role of this domain in the pressure propagation.

qualifier_chip.description: Qualifier chip label for this signal. Empty string for Q-00. NORM-Q applied. Raw Q-xx values forbidden.

EvidenceDrawer.description: Domain-level evidence drawer. One per evidence_block entry. Expandable in Phase 2.

domain_alias.description: Client-configured domain alias. ALI-04 applied. Raw domain IDs forbidden in any surface.

grounding_label.description: Normalized grounding label. NORM-Q applied. Raw grounding enum values forbidden.

propagation_role_label.description: Executive-visible propagation role label. NORM-PROP-01 applied. Values: Origin of Pressure / Pressure Receiver / Pressure Pass-through / Independent Domain.

signal_cards.description: Signal cards for this domain. Pre-rendered. Normalized at generation.

evidence_summary.description: Normalized evidence description. Vocabulary contract applied. Forbidden terms excluded.

default_state.description: Default display state. Phase 2: COLLAPSED by default.

SignalCard.description: A single signal entry within an evidence drawer.

signal_label.description: Normalized signal label. ALI-01/ALI-02 applied. Raw keys (cpi_score, cfa_score, CPI, CFA) forbidden.

pressure_tier.description: Internal pressure tier enum. Not directly shown to executive; used to derive pressure_label.

pressure_label.description: Executive-visible pressure label. NORM-PROP-01 applied. Numerical values forbidden.

qualifier_label.description: Qualifier label for this signal. Empty string for Q-00; Q-taxonomy label for Q-01..04.

evidence_text.description: Normalized evidence text. Vocabulary contract applied. NORM-NARR-02 and NORM-FORBID applied.

TraceObject.description: Propagation path and derivation lineage for the TRACE panel.

propagation_path.description: Ordered list of domain aliases in the propagation path. ALI-04 applied. Raw cluster keys forbidden.

propagation_summary.description: Normalized propagation narrative. NORM-PROP-01..03 applied. Predictive language forbidden.

baseline_ref.description: Baseline reference label. Readable label only; not decoded. Advisory visibility.

stream_anchor.description: Stream anchor reference label. Advisory visibility only.

derivation_ref_abbreviated.description: Abbreviated derivation reference (first 8 chars). Advisory visibility. Never decoded. Never full hash in advisory surface.

QualifierObject.description: Qualifier state object for the QUALIFIERS panel.

qualifier_class_label.description: Executive-visible qualifier label. Q-taxonomy chip label. Null for Q-00 (no chip). Raw Q-xx values forbidden.

scope_explanation.description: Pre-rendered Q-taxonomy scope explanation. Vocabulary contract applied.

chip_style.description: Design token for qualifier chip color. Q-01: AMBER. Q-02: BLUE. Q-03: GREY. Q-00/Q-04: NONE.

affected_domain_aliases.description: Domain aliases with partial or diagnostic grounding. ALI-04 applied.

suppression_prohibited.description: Qualifier suppression is permanently prohibited. This field is always true.

absence_notice.description: Q-04 absence notice. Required when qualifier_class = Q-04. 'Signal intelligence withheld from this view.'

LineageReference.description: Evidence provenance reference for the LINEAGE panel.

baseline_anchor.description: Readable baseline anchor label. Advisory and audit visibility.

evidence_hash_abbreviated.description: Abbreviated evidence_object_hash (8 chars + '...'). Advisory visibility only. Never decoded.

evidence_hash_full.description: Full evidence_object_hash. Audit visibility only. Never decoded or interpreted.

stream_anchor.description: Stream anchor. Advisory: reference label. Audit: full value.

run_id.description: Pipeline run identifier. Audit visibility only.

ConfidenceObject.description: Structural grounding confidence object for the CONFIDENCE panel. Non-probabilistic.

overall_grounding_scope.description: Overall grounding scope classification. Derived from qualifier_class.

grounding_label.description: Executive-visible grounding label. Q-taxonomy applied. Numerical confidence values forbidden.

scope_note.description: Pre-rendered grounding scope explanation. Q-taxonomy language applied.

probabilistic_scoring_prohibited.description: Probabilistic confidence scoring is permanently prohibited. Always true.

ReadinessExplanation.description: Readiness state explanation object for the READINESS_STATE panel.

readiness_label.description: Executive-visible readiness label. ALI-03 applied. Raw ReadinessState enum values forbidden.

governance_verdict.description: Governance verdict. FAIL triggers BLOCKED rendering.

evidence_linkage.description: Contributing evidence domains. ALI-04 aliases applied.

qualifier_linkage.description: Qualifier scope explanation if qualifier_class ≠ Q-00.

governance_linkage.description: Governance reference labels. Never governance internals.

reengagement_notice.description: Advisory confirmation notice for Q-03/Q-04 states only. Null for Q-00/Q-01/Q-02.

blocked_notice.description: Blocked state notice. Rendered when governance_verdict = FAIL or BridgeValidator fails.

ExplainabilityPanel.description: A single explainability panel within the bundle. Pre-rendered at generation. Immutable after bridge crossing.

audience.description: Default audience tier for this panel.

default_state.description: Default rendering state. Governance-determined, not UX-determined.

content_blocks.description: Ordered list of content blocks. Pre-rendered. Immutable.

signal_contributors.description: Contributing signal list. WHY panel only.

trace_object.description: Trace and lineage object. TRACE panel only.

qualifier_object.description: Qualifier state object. QUALIFIERS panel only.

confidence_object.description: Grounding confidence object. CONFIDENCE panel only.

readiness_explanation.description: Readiness classification explanation. READINESS_STATE panel only.

blocked_notice.description: Notice rendered when panel_state = BLOCKED. Explicit; never silent.

diagnostic_notice.description: Notice rendered when panel_state = DIAGNOSTIC. Explicit; never silent.

immutable.description: All panels are immutable after bridge crossing. Always true.

ExplainabilityBundle.description: The complete explainability bundle. Contains exactly seven panels. Pre-rendered at generation time. Immutable after bridge crossing.

why_panel.description: WHY panel. Answers: why does this readiness state exist? Default: EXPANDED.

evidence_panel.description: EVIDENCE panel with domain evidence drawers. Default: COLLAPSED.

trace_panel.description: TRACE panel with propagation path and lineage. Default: COLLAPSED. Advisory audience default.

qualifiers_panel.description: QUALIFIERS panel with evidence scope. Default: EXPANDED if qualifier active; COLLAPSED if Q-00.

lineage_panel.description: LINEAGE panel with analysis provenance. Default: COLLAPSED. Advisory visibility.

confidence_panel.description: CONFIDENCE panel with structural grounding coverage. Default: COLLAPSED.

readiness_state_panel.description: READINESS_STATE panel with classification detail. Default: EXPANDED.

live_generation_prohibited.description: Live content generation at render time is permanently prohibited. Always true.

topology_mutation_prohibited.description: Topology mutation via any panel interaction is permanently prohibited. Always true.

qualifier_suppression_prohibited.description: Qualifier suppression is permanently prohibited. Always true.

description: Root object: the explainability bundle for one LENS NextGen Executive Intelligence Report.
